title: Better Horses x Fresh Animations
description: A Fresh Animations Add-on for Better Horses!
body:
A Fresh Animations Add-on for Better Horses

Original version here

Fresh Animations here

Works best for Versions 1.19 -1.21
OptiFine OR ETF/EMF mods Required

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
Better Horses should be above Fresh Animations in your Resource Pack list to work properly
